permits.description: bernal height-branch library. (n)entry ramp,rear ramp at west side plaza.interior wk incl new stair, elev, mech. hvac system,(n)elec. service & lighting. demo of all int.lowerlevel& const.of(n) upper floor incl.(n)ada doors,casework& finishes,seismic upgrade incl. conc.openings,roof strengthenings

installation of a (n) chidlren's play area and play area surface. required path of travel work consisting of upgrading the restroom to full compliance alteration to 2 entries and pedestrian routes at play area and lower court.

barrier removal: alteration to 2 (e) restrooms to create single user restrooms. removal of toilet compartment partitions, rearangement of toilet compartment partitions, install unisex restroom geometric symbol signs, install threshold, new door hardware, & relocate 1 (e) baby diaper changing station
provide an elevator recall system only.
